hero.subtitle: No betting. No luck. Just your knowledge against the world.
hero.desc: GRIT is a competitive analytics arena for MMA fans. Pick fights with real odds. Build a track record that means something. Climb a global leaderboard that doesn't care who you are — only how sharp you are.

ai_arena.label: Phase 3 — Coming Soon
ai_arena.title: ONE FIGHT. CLAUDE vs GPT vs GROK.
ai_arena.subtitle: Same data. Same odds. Independent picks. Watch which AI is actually sharpest over time — and learn from the one that's right more often than the others.

showcase_fighters.label: Fighter Intelligence
showcase_fighters.title: EVERY FIGHTER. FULLY DECODED.
showcase_fighters.desc: Career stats, fight history, strike accuracy, finish rates, style tags, training camp signals, line-movement context. Your per-fight private notes layer on top — what you noticed at the weigh-in, what changed in camp, what to watch on fight night. Years of notes compound into your edge.
showcase_fighters.feat4: Your private notes — nobody else ever sees them

how_it_works.label: How It Works
how_it_works.title: FOUR STEPS. NO BETTING.
how_it_works.subtitle: From signup to your first ranked pick in under five minutes.
how_it_works.step1_desc: Sign up free as a Contender. Founder badges go to the first 1,000 Challengers — permanent, never reissued.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Browse the upcoming fight card. Pick winners with the locked moneyline odds. Flag your confidence. Lock in before the bell.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Results post as the night unfolds. Your net units move with every fight. Stars award when you finish positive.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Climb the global leaderboard. Earn Keys for perfect cards. Top finishers and lucky Challengers split the monthly bonus pool. Stack badges that don't reset.

leaderboard.label: Live Leaderboard
leaderboard.title: YOUR FIGHT IQ.
leaderboard.desc: Real-time scoring on net units. No participation weight, no accuracy gimmicks. Get the picks right and you climb. Miss them and you slide. Where you rank is exactly what you earned.
leaderboard.highlight2: Stars + badges advance with consistent ROI
leaderboard.highlight3: Net units = same math sportsbooks use
leaderboard.highlight4: Monthly bonus tiebreaker = earliest full-card lock wins
leaderboard.badge_progression: BADGES — NINJA → SAMURAI → MASTER → GRANDMASTER → GOAT

founder_badges.label: Founder Status — Limited
founder_badges.title: FIRST 1,000. PERMANENT. GONE FOREVER.
founder_badges.desc: Subscribe as a Challenger before the slots fill and earn a Founder Badge that stays with your account forever — even if you cancel. Slot counts never reset. Once they're gone, they're gone.

creator.label: Creator Economy
creator.title: SELL YOUR PICKS LEGITIMATELY.
creator.desc: MMA pick-selling has a scam problem. GRIT fixes it. Verified analysts list picks free (donations) or paid. Pick visibility per pick — public, subscriber-only, or reveal after the fight. Stripe escrow for 1-on-1 paid chat sessions with auto-refund if you don't show. No more Telegram pumps, no more vanishing creators.
creator.feat1: Free Creator (donations): start day one, no rank gate. Creator-friendly split disclosed at signup.
creator.feat2: Paid Creator: unlocks after account age, qualified events, and 2FA. Transparent terms in the Creator Agreement.
creator.feat3: 1-on-1 text chat sessions with Stripe escrow. 10-minute no-show auto-refund built in.
creator.feat4: Pick visibility enforced at the database level — no leaks.

pricing.label: Plans
pricing.title: TWO TIERS. AI TOKENS SEPARATE.
pricing.subtitle: Contender is free forever. Challenger unlocks the perks that matter. AI tokens are a separate purchase — pay only for what you use.
pricing.free_feat1: Pick every fight, climb the global leaderboard
pricing.free_feat2: Live fighter rating + per-fight private notes
pricing.plus_desc: Founder badge eligibility + full community + monthly bonus pool.
pricing.plus_feat2: Founder Badge if you're in the first 1,000 — permanent on cancel
pricing.plus_feat3: Full Emoji Mart + slip sharing in chat
pricing.plus_feat4: Intelligence Alerts — injury news, camp changes, sharp money
pricing.plus_feat5: Monthly bonus pool eligibility (top-ROI Challengers + random draws)
pricing.plus_feat6: Raffle entry from month 2 (auto-entered every event)
pricing.plus_feat7: Right to purchase AI tokens for analysis features
pricing.tokens_subtitle: Tokens unlock AI features. Challenger subscribers only. Tokens never expire while subscribed.

footer_cta.subtitle: First 1,000 Challengers earn a Founder Badge that never resets. Get in before the slots fill.

core_features.label: Platform Features
core_features.title: EVERYTHING YOU NEED.
core_features.subtitle: Pick fights with real odds. Track fighters with real data. Climb a leaderboard that doesn't lie. Unlock AI when you want deeper analysis.
core_features.feat1_desc: Live event cards, active picks, current rank, and your personal performance stats at a glance.
core_features.feat2_desc: Moneyline picks with locked odds. Optional method and round calls tracked privately. Confidence flags shape your strategy.
core_features.feat3_desc: Full career stats, fight history, strike + grappling breakdowns, AI scout briefs, and your private per-fight notes.
core_features.feat4_desc: Event-scoped chat opens when fights start. Challengers share winning slips. Featured slips hit the landing page.
core_features.feat5_desc: Quick breakdowns, matchup analysis, sharp money detection. Pay per query — no monthly cap, no waste.

ai_banner.label: Coming Phase 3
ai_banner.title: AI ARENA — CLAUDE vs GPT vs GROK.
ai_banner.desc: Independent picks from the three top models, scored against the same data. Live accuracy leaderboard. Find out which AI is actually sharp — and which one's just confident.

community.label: Community & Chat
community.title: THE FIGHT TALK NEVER STOPS.
community.desc: Every event has its own room. Opens when the event goes live, closes 24 hours after. Profanity filter pre-screens. Three-strike auto-mute. Slips moderated before posting. Real fans, real takes, none of the noise.
community.feat1_desc: Each fight card gets its own chat — joinable when the event opens, archived when it closes.
community.feat2_desc: Upload your winning ticket. Admin moderation. Featured slips hit the public Slip Wall.
community.feat3_desc: Your current badge (Ninja → GOAT) appears next to every message. Founder badge if you earned one.
community.feat4_desc: Challenger unlocks the full Emoji Mart library — every reaction you need.
community.feat5_desc: Profanity filter + link-spam detection + repeat-message throttle. The first troll on a live UFC card gets blocked before they post.

event_picks.label: Event Picks
event_picks.title: ONE UNIT. REAL ODDS. NO BETTING.
event_picks.desc: 1 unit per pick. Locked at the American moneyline at submission. Win on a +200 underdog = win 2 units. Win on a −200 favorite = win 0.5 units. Lose = lose 1 unit. Method and round picks tracked for personal accuracy but don't affect ranking. The leaderboard is pure net units — same math the sportsbooks use, no cash on the line.
event_picks.feat2: Method + round — your private accuracy tracker (doesn't affect rank)
event_picks.feat3: Confidence flags: None / Green / Yellow / Red
event_picks.feat4: Multi-layer pick lock — time + event status + manual flag

intel_section.title: Intelligence Alerts (Challenger)
intel_section.preview_sub: Examples of operator-curated signals available in GRIT
intel_section.sub: Injuries, weight cuts, camp changes, sharp money, line moves — admin-curated signals
